cinder_pact.name: Cinder Pact
cinder_pact.description: Your ship. A battered Apex Syndicate surplus transport, stripped of its military-grade systems and stuffed with cargo bays. It's held together by welding scars and stubbornness.

scout_marauder.name: Scout Marauder
scout_marauder.description: Fast and nimble. Sacrifices cargo space and fighters for speed and agility. Drift Cartel pilots love them.

merchant_hauler.name: Merchant Hauler
merchant_hauler.description: Slow, massive, profitable. The workhorse of legitimate commerce. Not much good in a fight but can carry four times what a Cinder Pact can.

ironveil_corvette.name: Ironveil Corvette
ironveil_corvette.description: Ironveil's answer to the corp wars: a ship that can both haul and hurt. Solid all-around, expensive.

apex_enforcer.name: Apex Enforcer
apex_enforcer.description: The ship Vael flew before the discharge. Pure military hardware — minimal cargo, maximum pain delivery.

ghost_wraith.name: Ghost Wraith
ghost_wraith.description: A Ghost Fleet vessel. No one knows how they're built or what powers them. Those who've faced them rarely get to describe the encounter.
